meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Finish Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on client work. Learn how to leverage AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship features faster and boost your freelance profit.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from manual debugging bottlenecks. By integrating Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for automated error remediation, you offload the cognitive load of syntax hunting. This stack allows you to ship production-ready code, maintain client velocity, and finally clear your backlog of unfinished projects.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the deadline is looming, and you are trapped in the '90% done' purgatory. You have the vision, but a stubborn bug in your authentication middleware or a broken API integration has stalled your momentum for the third day in a row. For a freelancer, this isn't just a technical hurdle; it is a direct hit to your bottom line and your professional reputation.

But what if you stopped wrestling with the code and started orchestrating it? By treating AI as your lead engineer, you can offload the tedious grunt work of debugging to specialized tools. It is time to stop being a code monkey and start acting like a high-velocity architect, using modern AI tooling to bridge the gap between 'almost finished' and 'delivered to client'.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Before throwing AI at the problem, use Antigravity to visualize your dependency tree to identify where the logic flow breaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and map the call sequence for the failing function. Identify potential circular dependencies.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs into Claude Code to get an immediate root cause analysis rather than manual stack trace parsing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the error log provided in the context, identify the specific line of failure, and suggest a fix based on best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze error.log and suggest a fix'

steps.title: Refactor for Resiliency
steps.description: Use AI to refactor the failing component into a modular, testable block of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified function into a modular, defensive programming pattern with proper error handling.

steps.title: Generate Unit Tests
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break other features by having the AI generate a comprehensive test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the newly refactored module to ensure edge case coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate and run tests for src/fixed_module.ts'

steps.title: Final Deployment Validation
steps.description: Perform a final integration check to ensure the project is ready for client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final audit of the project to check for any remaining 'TODO' markers or unhandled promises.

pro_tips: Always define a 'Definition of Done' in your system prompt so the AI knows exactly when to stop iterating.
Use Antigravity's architectural snapshots to show clients progress, adding value beyond just the finished product.
Run Claude Code in 'diff' mode to review every single character changed before committing to your repo.
Keep a 'debug-context.md' file that you feed into the AI to maintain consistency across long-running projects.
Automate your feedback loop by linking your Git commit hooks directly to a Claude Code linting command.
content.next_steps: Implement this workflow on your current 'stuck' project. Once you clear the bottleneck, document your process to create a reusable template for future client work.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to turn stalled projects into shipped successes. Stop letting bugs dictate your income. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
